mcp.name: @mindtrace/frameworks-mcp
mcp.purpose: Framework prompt routing, generation, and transformation

tools.name: frameworks.list
tools.summary: List available frameworks and styles (native, bdd, pom-bdd, etc).

tools.name: prompts.list
tools.summary: List available prompt packs for a given framework.

tools.name: prompts.get
tools.summary: Fetch the full prompt text for a given framework and prompt name.

tools.name: generate.tests
tools.summary: Generate tests from a contract/manifest and chosen framework mode.

tools.name: generate.patchPlan
tools.summary: Propose a contract patch-plan based on generation results.

tools.name: explain.mapping
tools.summary: Explain how contract fields map into test code conventions.
